zh.lifeSummary: 當Duke Boguslaw of Pomerania I於大約1127年出生時，他的父親Duke Wartislaw Swietoborzyc of Pomerania I37歲，母親Helena vel Heila von Sachsen39歲。他於1159年與Princess of Denmark Walburgis Waldemarsdatter在波蘭申傑n斯吉波維亞特 申傑n斯吉結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1187年3月18日享年61歲，埋葬在德國福萊斯塔阿特 海因里希_包莫可萊斯 武多-沃林武多姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Duke Boguslaw of Pomerania I于大约1127年出生时，他的父亲Duke Wartislaw Swietoborzyc of Pomerania I37岁，母亲Helena vel Heila von Sachsen39岁。他于1159年与Princess of Denmark Walburgis Waldemarsdatter在波兰申傑n斯吉波維亞特 申傑n斯吉结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1187年3月18日享年61岁，埋葬在德国福萊斯塔阿特 海因里希_包莫可萊斯 武多-沃林武多姆。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Korean Kyong, Kyong Suk, Young, Chae, Chi Young, Hang, Kil, Rin, Sang Hun, Chang, Chong, Insoo, Kum, Sun Young, Yom, Young Hwan.  Cambodian Kiwan, Oeurn, Phoeun, Pich, Saroeuth, Seung, Sophath, Sophea, Yoeun, Phan, Son.  Indian Shanti, Harendra.
Indian (Uttar Pradesh): Brahmin name, from Sanskrit om, the Hindu sacred and mystic syllable uttered at the beginning of prayers.
Cambodian: written ឱម, corresponding to the exclamation of solemn affirmation, of Sanskrit origin (see 1 above), chanted by Buddhist monks.

variants.name: Oum
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Southeast Asian Heang, Hye, Kam, Kan, Kheng, Khin, Kun, Sang, Sok, Phong, Yom, Yoo, Youn, Cuong, Phal, Samnang, Tin.  Cambodian Sokha, Chheang, Choeun, Moeun, Roeun, Sambath, Samoeun, Savuth, Soeun, Sopheap.
Cambodian: written អ៊ុំ, from a Khmer word denoting an elder sibling of one's parent (i.e. ‘uncle’ or ‘aunt’). Compare   Om   3 and   Um   2.

en.lifeSummary: When Duke Boguslaw of Pomerania I was born about 1127, his father, Duke Wartislaw Swietoborzyc of Pomerania I, was 37 and his mother, Helena vel Heila von Sachsen, was 39. He married Princess of Denmark Walburgis Waldemarsdatter in 1159, in Szczecin District, Szczecin, Poland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 18 March 1187, at the age of 61, and was buried in Usedom, Usedom-Wollin, Pomerania, Prussia, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Duke Boguslaw of Pomerania I est né environ 1127, son père, Duke Wartislaw Swietoborzyc of Pomerania I, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Helena vel Heila von Sachsen, avait 39 ans. Il a épousé Princess of Denmark Walburgis Waldemarsdatter en 1159, à Powiat szczeciński, szczecińskie, Pologne. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 18 mars 1187, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à Usedom, Kreis Usedom-Wollin, Pommern, Prusse, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Duke Boguslaw of Pomerania I um 1127 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Duke Wartislaw Swietoborzyc of Pomerania I 37 und seine Mutter Helena vel Heila von Sachsen 39. Er hat 1159 in Powiat szczeciński, Woiwodschaft Stettin, Polen Princess of Denmark Walburgis Waldemarsdatter geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 18. März 1187 im Alter von 61 Jahren und wurde in Usedom, Kreis Usedom-Wollin, Pommern, Freistaat Preußen, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Duke Boguslaw of Pomerania I è nato il circa 1127, il suo padre, Duke Wartislaw Swietoborzyc of Pomerania I, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Helena vel Heila von Sachsen, aveva 39 anni. Lui sposato Princess of Denmark Walburgis Waldemarsdatter nel 1159, nel Powiat szczeciński, szczecińskie, Polonia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 18 marzo 1187, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolto a Usedom, Kreis Usedom-Wollin, Pommern, Freistaat Preußen, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Duke Boguslaw of Pomerania Iが約1127年に生まれた時，父Duke Wartislaw Swietoborzyc of Pomerania Iは37歳，母Helena vel Heila von Sachsenは39歳であった。1159年にポーランドスズクズエシnスキポウィアト スズクズエシnスキでPrincess of Denmark Walburgis Waldemarsdatterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1187年3月18日に61歳で死去し，ドイツフレイスタアト プレウssンポンメルンクレイス ウセドム-ウオリンウセドムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Duke Boguslaw of Pomerania I(이)가 대략 1127년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Duke Wartislaw Swietoborzyc of Pomerania I(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Helena vel Heila von Sachsen(은)는 39세였다. 그는 1159년 폴란드 스즈치시n스키 파위앳 스즈치시n스키에서 Princess of Denmark Walburgis Waldemarsdatter(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1187년 3월 18일 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 프레이스타앳 프레우ss 폼머 크레이스 세돔-울린 세돔에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Duke Boguslaw of Pomerania I nasceu aproximadamente 1127, seu pai, Duke Wartislaw Swietoborzyc of Pomerania I, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Helena vel Heila von Sachsen, tinha 39 anos. Ele casou-se com Princess of Denmark Walburgis Waldemarsdatter em 1159, em Powiat szczeciński, szczecińskie, Polônia. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 18 de março de 1187, com 61 anos, e foi sepultado em Usedom, Kreis Usedom-Wollin, Pommern, Freistaat Preußen, Alemanha.

ru.Klosterberg Usedom,Pommerania,Prussia: уседом, крис уседом-воллинь, поммирн, Пруссия, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Duke Boguslaw of Pomerania I родился около 1127 г., его отцу по имени Duke Wartislaw Swietoborzyc of Pomerania I было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Helena vel Heila von Sachsen, 39. Он женился на женщине по имени Princess of Denmark Walburgis Waldemarsdatter в 1159 г. в местности поуят сзкзесиnски, сзкзесиnски, Польша. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 18 марта 1187 г. в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности уседом, крис уседом-воллинь, поммирн, Пруссия, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Duke Boguslaw of Pomerania I nació aproximadamente 1127, su papá, Duke Wartislaw Swietoborzyc of Pomerania I, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Helena vel Heila von Sachsen, tenía 39 años. Se casó con Princess of Denmark Walburgis Waldemarsdatter en 1159, en Powiat szczeciński, szczecińskie, Polonia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 18 de marzo de 1187, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultado en Usedom, Kreis Usedom-Wollin, Pommern, Freistaat Preußen, Alemania.
